sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, value String, ts DateTime DEFAULT now());
BEGIN TRANSACTION; SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = ANY (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value = 'test_value_1'); ROLLBACK;
BEGIN TRANSACTION; SELECT transactionLatestSnapshot(), id FROM test_table WHERE id = ANY (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE LENGTH(value) > 5); ROLLBACK;
CREATE TABLE temp_table (id Nullable(UInt64), data Float64);
BEGIN TRANSACTION; SELECT transactionLatestSnapshot(), id FROM test_table WHERE value = ANY (SELECT data FROM temp_table WHERE id IS NOT NULL); ROLLBACK;
BEGIN TRANSACTION; SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id = ANY (SELECT id FROM temp_table WHERE data < 5.0)) GROUP BY ts HAVING COUNT(*) > 0; ROLLBACK;
BEGIN TRANSACTION; SELECT transactionLatestSnapshot() AS snapshot, (SELECT AVG(data) FROM temp_table) FROM test_table WHERE id = ANY (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL); ROLLBACK;
CREATE TABLE another_test (id UInt64, val String);
BEGIN TRANSACTION; SELECT transactionLatestSnapshot(), * FROM another_test WHERE id = ANY (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id IS NOT NULL); ROLLBACK;
BEGIN TRANSACTION; SELECT DISTINCT id FROM test_table WHERE value = ANY (SELECT val FROM another_test WHERE val LIKE 'a%') AND id > 0; ROLLBACK;
